title: $\mathbb{Q}$-acyclicity of the assembled universal cover via equivariant Mayer\textendash Vietoris

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Must prove $H_*(\widetilde M;\mathbb{Q})=H_*(\mathrm{pt};\mathbb{Q})$ for the assembled free $\Gamma$-manifold $\widetilde M$.

**Obligation.** Set up a Mayer\textendash Vietoris / spectral-sequence argument over the $\Gamma$-orbit decomposition: $\widetilde M = (X\setminus \bigsqcup\text{cones}) \cup \bigsqcup \widetilde{W}_F$. Use that (a) $X$ is contractible, (b) each inserted piece is $\mathbb{Q}$-acyclic (rel boundary), (c) the deleted links are $\mathbb{Q}$-homology spheres, and show the rational homology collapses to that of a point. The noncompactness of $\widetilde M$ (with finitely many orbit types, cocompact quotient) must be handled carefully; exact cancellation in each degree must be demonstrated, not asserted.
